figures.caption: Table 5. Projection rule for P = while c@B do Pbody exit Pexit .
Table 1. Inductive MSC semantics of global workflows.
Table 4. Projection rule for P = if c@B then P⊤ else P⊥.

Fig. 1. MSC for reviewed execution. Filled dots are local actions (opaque computations), arrows are messages labelled by the value sent. Planner owns the conditional. The true branch involves Reviewer; in the false branch, Planner records that review was skipped. After the conditional, Planner forwards the plan to Executor, whose result is finalized by Orchestrator.
